messaging_analysis.buy_crypto_framing: direct — explicitly emphasizes trading crypto with clear action-oriented language

messaging_analysis.summary: This competitor (Kraken) uses a direct, trading-focused approach emphasizing speed as their key differentiator. The 48-day run suggests the speed/performance angle resonates with their target audience, using visual carousel format to demonstrate product capabilities rather than explaining features through text.
